strongest_review_quote.text: We found Corvell on Instagram & was really impressed from the get go when Jack came to measure up to quote for some tiling in our kitchen, utility & wc - his attention to detail in checking exactly what we wanted & advising on tiles/grout etc was so useful! The quote was so competitively priced we booked on right away! Jack & Nick then did such an immaculate efficient job, we absolutely love our new tiles! Now recommending them to everyone we know and booked them to fit my mums bathroom & can’t
strongest_review_quote.author: Harriet
